GDACS.DisasterAlert.name: DisasterAlert
GDACS.DisasterAlert.description: A disaster alert from the Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (GDACS), covering earthquakes, tropical cyclones, floods, volcanoes, forest fires, and droughts worldwide.

GDACS.DisasterAlert.name: DisasterAlert
GDACS.DisasterAlert.description: A disaster alert from the Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (GDACS), representing a single episode of a natural disaster event such as an earthquake, tropical cyclone, flood, volcano eruption, forest fire, or drought.

schema.name: DisasterAlert
schema.description: A disaster alert from the Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (GDACS), representing a single episode of a natural disaster event such as an earthquake, tropical cyclone, flood, volcano eruption, forest fire, or drought.

event_type.description: The type of natural disaster reported by GDACS. EQ = Earthquake, TC = Tropical Cyclone, FL = Flood, VO = Volcano, FF = Forest Fire, DR = Drought.

event_id.description: The unique numeric identifier assigned to the disaster event by GDACS, stable across all episodes and updates for the same event.

episode_id.description: The unique numeric identifier for a specific episode within an event. Events such as tropical cyclones may have multiple episodes as they evolve over time.

alert_level.description: The overall GDACS alert level for the event, indicating the expected humanitarian impact. Green = low impact, Orange = moderate impact, Red = high impact requiring international response.

alert_score.description: A numeric score (0.0–3.0) representing the overall alert severity. Higher values indicate greater expected impact. Derived from severity, population exposure, and vulnerability.

episode_alert_level.description: The GDACS alert level specific to this episode, which may differ from the overall event alert level as conditions evolve.

episode_alert_score.description: A numeric score (0.0–3.0) representing the alert severity for this specific episode.

event_name.description: The human-readable name assigned to the event by GDACS, such as a cyclone name or descriptive location label.

severity_value.description: The numeric severity measure for the event. The meaning depends on the event type: magnitude for earthquakes, wind speed for cyclones, water level for floods, VEI for volcanoes.

severity_unit.description: The unit of measurement for the severity value. Examples: 'M' (Richter magnitude), 'km/h' (wind speed), 'm' (water level), 'VEI' (Volcanic Explosivity Index).

severity_text.description: A human-readable text description of the severity, as provided in the GDACS RSS feed severity element text content.

country.description: The name of the country or countries affected by the disaster event, as reported by GDACS.

iso3.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code(s) for the affected country or countries.

latitude.description: The latitude of the disaster event epicenter or centroid in decimal degrees (WGS84).

longitude.description: The longitude of the disaster event epicenter or centroid in decimal degrees (WGS84).

from_date.description: The date and time when the disaster event was first detected or began, in ISO-8601 format.

to_date.description: The date and time when the disaster event ended or was last observed, in ISO-8601 format. May be absent for ongoing events.

population_value.description: The estimated number of people exposed to or affected by the disaster event, as calculated by GDACS impact models.

population_unit.description: The unit for the population value, typically 'Pop' (population count) or a radius-based exposure descriptor.

vulnerability.description: A GDACS-calculated vulnerability score (0.0–3.0) that reflects the affected region's capacity to cope with the disaster, factoring in infrastructure, governance, and socioeconomic conditions.

bbox_min_lon.description: The minimum longitude of the bounding box that encloses the affected area, in decimal degrees.

bbox_max_lon.description: The maximum longitude of the bounding box that encloses the affected area, in decimal degrees.

bbox_min_lat.description: The minimum latitude of the bounding box that encloses the affected area, in decimal degrees.

bbox_max_lat.description: The maximum latitude of the bounding box that encloses the affected area, in decimal degrees.

is_current.description: Whether this disaster event is currently ongoing according to GDACS. True if the event is still active, false if it has concluded.

version.description: The version number of this event record in GDACS. Incremented each time the event data is updated or revised.

description.description: The RSS item description text, typically a brief HTML or plain-text summary of the disaster event with key impact details.

link.description: The URL linking to the full GDACS event report page for this disaster event.

pub_date.description: The date and time when this RSS item was published or last updated, in ISO-8601 format.
